# timezone
_Last updated: 2026-05-20 02:48_

```js
// usage
chance.timezone()
```

Return a random timezone

```js
chance.timezone();
=> {
"name": "India Standard Time",
"abbr": "IST",
"offset": 5.5,
"isdst": false,
"text": "(UTC+05:30) Chennai, Kolkata, Mumbai, New Delhi",
"utc": ["Asia/Calcutta"]
}
```
